required_version.description: Minimum AgentV version required to run this project's evals. Uses semver range syntax (e.g., '>=2.11.0', '^2.11.0'). When the installed version is below the range, AgentV warns and prompts to update.

eval_patterns.description: Glob patterns for discovering eval files during interactive mode (`agentv eval` with no args). Defaults to ['**/evals/**/dataset*.yaml', '**/evals/**/eval.yaml'] if not specified.

execution.description: Default execution options. CLI flags take precedence over these values.

keep_workspaces.description: Always keep temp workspaces after eval (equivalent to --keep-workspaces)

workspace_path.description: Machine-local existing workspace directory for eval runs (equivalent to --workspace-path). Only honored in .agentv/config.local.yaml; do not commit local paths.

workspace_mode.description: Machine-local workspace preparation override (equivalent to --workspace-mode). Only honored in .agentv/config.local.yaml. Use static with workspace_path, temp for fresh materialization, or pooled for default shared repo pooling.

otel_file.description: Write OTLP JSON trace to this path (equivalent to --otel-file). Supports {timestamp} placeholder.

projects.description: Global Dashboard project registry entries. Only valid in $AGENTV_HOME/config.yaml.

hooks.description: Lifecycle hooks that run at specific points during agentv execution.

before_session.description: Shell command to run once at agentv startup, before any command executes. stdout is parsed for env var exports (KEY=value or export KEY="value") and injected into process.env. Keys already set in the environment are not overwritten. stderr is forwarded to the user. Non-zero exit aborts with an error.

git_cache.description: Local mirror configuration for workspace repo materialization. Mirrors are an optimization: when a repo's mirror path exists locally, AgentV materializes the pinned commit from it instead of cloning from GitHub. Resolvable from three layers, highest precedence first: the project-local '.agentv/config.override.yaml' (intended to be gitignored, for machine-specific paths), the committed project '.agentv/config.yaml', then the user-global '$AGENTV_HOME/config.yaml'. Higher layers override lower ones by normalized repo identity.

mirrors.description: Map of repo identity (full clone URL or 'org/name' shorthand) to a local clone path used as a mirror. If the path is absent at runtime, AgentV falls back to cloning from GitHub with configured credentials.

additionalProperties.description: Local path to a clone of the repo (supports '~' home expansion).

sourceRepoBlock.description: Source project repository block. Use url for the Git endpoint, path for the local checkout path, and branch for the checkout branch.

resultsRepoBlock.description: Results repository block. Use remote for the Git endpoint URL, path for an existing local results checkout or managed clone path, and branch for the storage branch.

remote.description: Results Git remote endpoint URL used for fetching and pushing.

path.description: Existing local results checkout path when remote is omitted, or managed results clone path when remote is set.

resultsConfig.description: Git-backed results repo configuration. Canonical form uses a nested repo block.

auto_push.description: Push result commits best-effort after each completed run.

require_push.description: Fail the command if a configured push fails after writing local artifacts.

branch_prefix.description: Prefix for temporary result branch names; this is not the storage branch.
